'''basate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeugmatically|zeugmatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeugmatically|zeugmatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| basate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:basate|basate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:basatesher|basatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basatesherĂ«m|basatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:basatero|basatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:basateshĂ«|basateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basateshĂ«m|basateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibasatero|gokibasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibasateshĂ«|gokibasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasateshĂ«m|gokibasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobasankerom|gobasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobasankeshĂ«|gobasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasankeshĂ«m|gobasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobasankeya|gobasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:basaterom|basaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basatemu|basatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:basateya|basateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibasaterom|gokibasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasatemu|gokibasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibasateya|gokibasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:basasate|basasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:basasatesher|basasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basasatesherĂ«m|basasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:basasatero|basasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:basasateshĂ«|basasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basasateshĂ«m|basasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibasasatero|gokibasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibasasateshĂ«|gokibasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasasateshĂ«m|gokibasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobasasankerom|gobasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobasasankeshĂ«|gobasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasasankeshĂ«m|gobasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobasasankeya|gobasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:basasaterom|basasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basasatemu|basasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:basasateya|basasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibasasaterom|gokibasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasasatemu|gokibasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibasasateya|gokibasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠte|bĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠtesher|bĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠtero|bĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠtero|gokibĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠterom|bĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠtemu|bĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠteya|bĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠterom|gokibĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠsĂŠteya|gokibĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafsafte|bafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafsaftesher|bafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafsaftesherĂ«m|bafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafsaftero|bafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafsafteshĂ«|bafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafsafteshĂ«m|bafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafsaftero|gokibafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafsafteshĂ«|gokibafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafsafteshĂ«m|gokibafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafsafnkerom|gobafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafsafnkeshĂ«|gobafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafsafnkeshĂ«m|gobafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafsafnkeya|gobafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafsafterom|bafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafsaftemu|bafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafsafteya|bafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafsafterom|gokibafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafsaftemu|gokibafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafsafteya|gokibafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
